records.question: Which companies in the Banking industry have their headquarters in France, are named BNP Paribas, and have a market value of 88 billion, assets of 2680.7 billion, sales of 130.4 billion, and profits of 10.5 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.headquarters = 'France' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas' AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.assets_billion = 2680.7 AND companies.sales_billion = 130.4 AND companies.profits_billion = 10.5 AND companies.industry = 'Banking'
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies where lower(industry) like '%banking%' and lower(headquarters) like '%france%' and lower(name) like '%bnp paribas%' and market_value_billion = 88 and assets_billion = 2680.7 and sales_billion = 130.4 and profits_billion = 10.5 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies by exact industry, headquarters, name, market value, assets, sales, and profits as specified in the question.

records.question: What companies in the Oil and gas industry have a market value of exactly 407.2 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.market_value_billion = '407.2' AND companies.industry = 'Oil and gas'
records.pred_sql: select id from Companies where lower(Industry) like '%oil and gas%' and Market_Value_billion = 407.2 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies by industry containing 'oil and gas' and market value exactly 407.2 billion, selecting their ids with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which companies have a market value of exactly 320.8 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.market_value_billion = '320.8'
records.pred_sql: select id from Companies where Market_Value_billion = 320.8 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find companies with a market value exactly equal to 320.8 billion, so we filter the Companies table on Market_Value_billion = 320.8.

records.question: Which companies in the Conglomerate industry with a market value of 216.2 billion and profits of 11.6 billion have sales of at least 156.2 billion and office locations moving in 2024 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE office_locations.move_in_year >= 2024 AND companies.sales_billion >= 156.2 AND companies.market_value_billion = '216.2' AND companies.industry = 'Conglomerate' AND companies.profits_billion = 11.6
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies join office_locations on companies.id = office_locations.company_id where lower(companies.industry) like '%conglomerate%' and companies.market_value_billion = 216.2 and companies.profits_billion = 11.6 and companies.sales_billion >= 156.2 and office_locations.move_in_year >= 2024 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies by industry, market value, profits, and sales, then join with office_locations to check move_in_year >= 2024.

records.question: Which companies have exactly 1723.5 billion in assets and have office locations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.assets_billion = 1723.5
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies join office_locations on companies.id = office_locations.company_id where companies.assets_billion = 1723.5 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies with assets_billion exactly 1723.5 and ensure they have office locations by joining with the Office_locations table.

records.question: Which companies have office locations with a move-in year of at least 2027?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE office_locations.move_in_year >= 2027
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies join office_locations on companies.id = office_locations.company_id where office_locations.move_in_year >= 2027 limit 5;
records.thought: To find companies with office locations having a move-in year of at least 2027, join Companies with Office_locations and filter by move_in_year >= 2027.

records.question: Which companies named BNP Paribas have a market value of 88 billion, assets of at least 2680.7 billion, profits of at most 10.5 billion, and are located in buildings where the status is proposed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.status = 'proposed' AND companies.assets_billion >= 2680.7 AND companies.profits_billion <= 10.5 AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas'
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies join office_locations on companies.id = office_locations.company_id join buildings on office_locations.building_id = buildings.id where lower(companies.name) like '%bnp paribas%' and companies.market_value_billion = 88 and companies.assets_billion >= 2680.7 and companies.profits_billion <= 10.5 and lower(buildings.status) like '%proposed%' limit 5
records.thought: Filter companies by name, market value, assets, and profits, then join with office_locations and buildings to ensure the building status is 'proposed'.

records.question: Which companies named Santander Group in the Banking industry have sales of at least 109.7 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.sales_billion >= 109.7 AND companies.name = 'Santander Group' AND companies.industry = 'Banking'
records.pred_sql: select id from Companies where lower(name) like '%santander group%' and lower(industry) like '%banking%' and sales_billion >= 109.7 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies by name 'Santander Group' in the Banking industry with sales greater than or equal to 109.7 billion.

records.question: Which companies named Total are headquartered in France with a market value of exactly 138 billion, profits exactly 14.2 billion, and at least 188.1 billion in sales and 192.8 billion in assets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.market_value_billion = '138' AND companies.headquarters = 'France' AND companies.sales_billion >= 188.1 AND companies.assets_billion >= 192.8 AND companies.name = 'Total' AND companies.profits_billion = 14.2
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies where lower(name) like '%total%' and lower(headquarters) like '%france%' and market_value_billion = 138 and profits_billion = 14.2 and sales_billion >= 188.1 and assets_billion >= 192.8 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies with name like 'total', headquartered in France, exact market value and profits, and minimum sales and assets as specified.

records.question: Which companies with a market value of exactly 186.5 billion have sales at most 103.3 billion and profits at most 13.3 billion, whose offices in Mexico City are in proposed buildings that are 210 meters tall, have at most 59 stories, and where the move-in year is exactly 2028?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE companies.market_value_billion = '186.5' AND buildings.status = 'proposed' AND companies.sales_billion <= 103.3 AND buildings.height = 210 AND office_locations.move_in_year = 2028 AND companies.profits_billion <= 13.3 AND buildings.stories <= 59 AND buildings.city = 'Mexico City'
records.pred_sql: select companies.id from companies join office_locations on companies.id = office_locations.company_id join buildings on office_locations.building_id = buildings.id where companies.market_value_billion = 186.5 and companies.sales_billion <= 103.3 and companies.profits_billion <= 13.3 and lower(buildings.city) like '%mexico city%' and buildings.status like '%proposed%' and buildings.height = 210 and buildings.stories <= 59 and office_locations.move_in_year = 2028 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter companies by exact market value, sales, and profits, join with office locations and buildings to filter by city, building status, height, stories, and move-in year.
